name: Cold Lemon Souffle with Ladyfingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in cold water.
2. Beat egg yolks in a medium-size bowl until light. Add sugar, gelatin mixture, and lemon juice. Cook the mixture by placing the bowl in hot water (as when preparing hollandaise) and whisking steadily until smooth and slightly thickened. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff and glossy, gradually adding 1/2 cup sugar. Add salt and cream of tartar.
4. Fold the egg whites into the egg yolk mixture.
5. Whip the cream until thickened but not completely stiff. Fold it into the egg mixture.
6. Butter the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan (or use cooking spray) and line with ladyfingers. Stand the ladyfingers up around the sides.
7. Spoon the souffle mixture into the pan and refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
8. Remove from the springform pan and serve with a dollop of whipped cream if desired.
